claim: FAO reports that 2.4 billion people lack access to adequate food year-round, with urban food deserts emerging as a growing problem in LMIC cities where fresh-food markets are being displaced by development.

source.title: The State of Food Security and Nutrition in the World 2023

method: Reviewed FAO SOFI report, urban-food-access analysis, and food-desert research.
limitations: Urban food-desert data is sparse in LMICs.
Market-location data may not capture informal vendors.
